summary: Layoff activity in the EU eased slightly week-over-week, led by cuts in German automotive and Nordic telecom. Hiring momentum continues in AI infrastructure, defense tech, and grid engineering, while Cedefop flags persistent shortages in healthcare and skilled trades across most member states.
